capabilities.name: Authentication
capabilities.description: Verifies user or service identity.

capabilities.name: CI Generation
capabilities.description: Generates provider CI workflows from Workflow config.

capabilities.name: Feature Flags
capabilities.description: Evaluates feature flags and rollout decisions.

capabilities.name: IaC Provider
capabilities.description: Plans and applies infrastructure resources through provider plugins.

capabilities.name: IaC State Backend
capabilities.description: Stores infrastructure state in local or provider backends.

capabilities.name: Message Broker
capabilities.description: Publishes, subscribes, and routes messages.

capabilities.name: Schema Migrations
capabilities.description: Validates and runs database schema migrations.

capabilities.name: Secrets Management
capabilities.description: Declares, resolves, and writes secrets across provider scopes.

capabilities.name: Database Storage
capabilities.description: Provides SQL or embedded persistence.

capabilities.name: Object Storage
capabilities.description: Reads and writes object/blob storage.

capabilities.name: Tenant Scope
capabilities.description: Carries tenant identity through routes, storage, and provider resources.
